requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic compatibility expectations in UAE imports
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋进口中的电磁兼容要求
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋進口中的電磁相容要求

summary.en: Many UAE import dossiers reference electrical safety and EMC as part of the ECAS technical package rather than a standalone public blanket regime for all power tools. Importers commonly provide IEC 61000/CISPR test evidence or equivalent technical reports for motor-driven tools and control modules, especially when equipment interacts with data interfaces or wireless environments. No universal UAE-only EMC acceptance is assumed without project review.
summary.zh: 阿联酋进口技术包中常将电磁兼容视为ECAS技术文件的一部分，而非所有电动工具的单一统一强制制度。涉及通信接口或控制模块的产品通常会提交IEC 61000/CISPR类测试报告或等效报告。没有不经项目审查的“全量放行”说法。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋進口技術包中常將電磁相容視為 ECAS 技術文件的一部分，而非所有電動工具的單一統一強制制度。涉及通信接口或控制模組的產品通常會提交 IEC 61000/CISPR 類測試報告或等效報告。未有無需專案審核的“全量放行”情形。

standards_or_laws: UAE conformity routes for regulated electrical products that require EMC evidence in technical file
IEC 61000 series and CISPR emission/immunity methods

summary.en: China test data is commonly generated using GB 4824 and GB/T 17799-series EMC frameworks for relevant classes of electrical products, and for power tools it is often linked with GB/T 3883.x safety test sets. These can be reused for technical comparison, but UAE acceptance often depends on the specific regulated scope in the importer's ECAS route rather than automatic reciprocity.
summary.zh: 中国侧常用GB 4824及GB/T 17799系列进行EMC测试，并与GB/T 3883.x类安全测试链路一起出具证据。该数据可用于技术对照，但阿联酋通常按进出口ECAS具体对象决定是否接受，不是自动互认。
summary.zht: 中國側常用 GB 4824 及 GB/T 17799 系列進行 EMC 測試，並與 GB/T 3883.x 類安全測試鏈路一起出具證據。該數據可用於技術對照，但阿聯酋通常按進出口 ECAS 具體對象決定是否接受，不是自動互認。

gap.en: The usual exporter gap is acceptance criteria. Chinese GB-based EMC reports are often technically useful but may be re-interpreted for scope, test setup, and documentation format requested under UAE ECAS and importer contracts.
gap.zh: 通常差距在于“是否被接受”。中国GB体系报告常具有技术价值，但在UAE ECAS和买方合同要求下，可能因测试范围、试验布置、文件格式不同而需要重制或补充。
gap.zht: 通常差距在於“是否被接受”。中國 GB 體系報告常具有技術價值，但在 UAE ECAS 和買方合同要求下，可能因測試範圍、測試佈置、文件格式不同而需重製或補充。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional mandatory; depends on regulated category, product construction, and buyer/certification route requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional mandatory where a defined GB/CCC category and EMC evidence requirement applies in the Chinese baseline.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EMC packages are a strong baseline but UAE customs and ECAS acceptance is usually scope-specific and may need UAE-language and UAE-referenced technical mapping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC资料是有用基础，但阿联酋通关和ECAS接受通常与具体范围绑定，常需要UAE语境下的技术映射和文件转换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國 EMC 資料是有用基礎，但阿聯酋通關與 ECAS 接受通常與具體範圍綁定，常需要 UAE 語境下的技術映射及文件轉換。
